# Titan X5-B GPU — Individual Contributor License Agreement

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Titan X5-B GPU!

This Contributor License Agreement ("CLA") sets out the terms under
which you ("You" or "Contributor") grant rights to Adhiraj
("Maintainer", "we", or "us") for your
contributions to the Titan X5-B GPU project (the "Project").

## 1. Definitions

- **"Contribution"** means any original work of authorship, including
  any modifications or additions to existing work, that is intentionally
  submitted by You to the Project for inclusion in, or documentation of,
  the Project.

- **"Submitted"** means any form of electronic, verbal, or written
  communication sent to the Maintainer or the Project, including but
  not limited to communications on electronic mailing lists, source
  code control systems, issue tracking systems, pull requests, or
  direct messages.

- **"Work"** means the Titan X5-B GPU hardware design, including all
  SystemVerilog source code, testbenches, documentation, and any
  related materials.

## 2. Grant of Copyright License

Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, You hereby grant
to the Maintainer a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge,
royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license to:

1. Reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly
   perform, sublicense, and distribute Your Contributions and such
   derivative works.

2. To license the Work (including Your Contributions) under any terms
   the Maintainer chooses, including but not limited to:
   - The CERN-OHL-S-2.0 open source license
   - A commercial license agreement
   - Any future license the Maintainer may choose

## 3. Grant of Patent License

Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, You hereby grant
to the Maintainer a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge,
royalty-free, irrevocable patent license to make, have made, use, offer
to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer the Work, where such
license applies only to those patent claims licensable by You that are
necessarily infringed by Your Contribution(s) alone or by combination
of Your Contribution(s) with the Work.

## 4. You Represent and Warrant That:

1. You are the sole author of each of Your Contributions and have the
   legal right to grant the licenses in Sections 2 and 3.

2. Each of Your Contributions is your original work (or, if not, you
   have the right to submit it under the licenses above).

3. Your Contributions do not, to the best of your knowledge, infringe
   the intellectual property rights of any third party.

4. You are not aware of any pending or threatened legal action,
   claim, or proceeding that would affect the validity of your
   Contributions or the Maintainer's right to use them.

5. You are at least 18 years old (or, if under 18, have the consent
   of a parent or legal guardian).

## 5. Disclaimer

You are not expected to provide support for Your Contributions, except
to the extent You desire to provide support. You may provide support
for free, for a fee, or not at all. Unless required by applicable law
or agreed to in writing, Your Contributions are provided "AS IS"
without any warranties or conditions of any kind, either express or
implied, including, without limitation, any warranties or conditions
of title, non-infringement, merchantability, or fitness for a
particular purpose.

## 6. Right to Revoke

You have the right to revoke the grants made in this Agreement as to
future Contributions at any time by written notice to the Maintainer.
However, this revocation does not affect the rights granted for
Contributions already submitted and incorporated into the Work.

## 7. Miscellaneous

1. This Agreement is governed by the laws of India, without regard
   to its conflict of laws provisions.

2. Any dispute arising from this Agreement shall be resolved in the
   courts of [Your City, e.g., Bangalore], India.

3. This Agreement is the entire agreement between You and the
   Maintainer regarding Your Contributions.

4. If any provision of this Agreement is found unenforceable, the
   remaining provisions remain in full force and effect.

5. The Maintainer may update this CLA from time to time. Continued
   submission of Contributions after an update constitutes acceptance
   of the updated CLA.

## 8. Acknowledgment

By submitting a Contribution to the Project (e.g., via a pull request,
patch, or other submission), You acknowledge that You have read,
understood, and agree to be bound by this Agreement.
